meaning: v.眨眼；闪烁 n.眨眼；闪光；一瞬间
example: I blink my eyes when I feel tired.
translation: 当我感到疲倦时，我会眨眼。

example: My dad is the boss of his company.
translation: 我爸爸是他公司的老板。

example: The cowboy rides a horse on the ranch.
translation: 牛仔在牧场上骑马。

example: We can use this room for now.
translation: 我们现在可以使用这个房间。

example: The pilot flies the airplane safely.
translation: 飞行员安全地驾驶飞机。

example: We finish school at 4 P.M. every day.
translation: 我们每天下午4点放学。

example: The little girl rides a pony in the park.
translation: 小女孩在公园里骑小马。

meaning: adv.真正地；的确；很；十分；非常 ；确实；答话时表示感兴趣或惊讶
example: I really enjoy playing basketball.
translation: 我真的很喜欢打篮球。

example: The spacecraft travels to the moon.
translation: 宇宙飞船飞往月球。

example: The supersonic plane flies very fast.
translation: 超音速飞机飞得非常快。

meaning: n.姑妈；姨妈；伯母；婶婶；舅妈
example: My auntie gives me a present on my birthday.
translation: 我阿姨在我生日时给我礼物。

example: Australia Day is celebrated on January 26th.
translation: 澳大利亚国庆节在1月26日庆祝。

meaning: adj.澳大利亚的；澳大利亚人的 n.澳 大利亚人
example: My pen pal is an Australian boy.
translation: 我的笔友是一个澳大利亚男孩。

meaning: n.婴儿；幼兽；幼⻦ adj.幼小的
example: The baby is crying for milk.
translation: 婴儿在哭着要奶喝。

example: Canberra is the capital city of Australia.
translation: 堪培拉是澳大利亚的首都。

example: We climb the mountain every summer.
translation: 我们每年夏天爬山。

example: It is a fact that the earth is round.
translation: 地球是圆的，这是事实。

example: My new classmate is very friendly.
translation: 我的新同学非常友好。

example: The koala eats eucalyptus leaves.
translation: 考拉吃桉树叶。

meaning: adj.小的，年幼的；可爱的，可怜的 ，讨厌的
example: I have a little sister who is five years old.
translation: 我有一个五岁的小妹妹。

meaning: adj.爱交际的；友好的；外向的；即 将离职的；往外去的
example: My best friend is outgoing and likes to make new friends.
translation: 我最好的朋友性格外向，喜欢交新朋友。

meaning: n.第六；六分之一 adj.第六的；六分 之一的
example: I am in the sixth grade this year.
translation: 我今年上六年级。

example: We celebrate the Spring Festival with our family.
translation: 我们和家人一起庆祝春节。

meaning: n.尾；尾巴；尾随者 v.跟踪
example: The dog wags its tail when it is happy.
translation: 狗高兴时会摇尾巴。

meaning: adj.忙碌的；活跃的；积极的；主动 的
example: My brother is very active in sports.
translation: 我哥哥在运动方面非常活跃。

example: My mom adds celery to the salad.
translation: 我妈妈在沙拉里加芹菜。

meaning: n.櫻桃；櫻桃树；櫻桃色 adj.櫻桃色 的；鲜红色的
example: The cherry tree has pink flowers in spring.
translation: 樱桃树在春天开粉色的花。

example: I like to eat corn-on-the-cob in summer.
translation: 我喜欢在夏天吃玉米棒子。

meaning: v.适合；合适，合身 adj.健康的；健 壮的；适合的
example: I exercise every day to stay fit.
translation: 我每天锻炼保持健康。

example: I drink water from a glass every day.
translation: 我每天用玻璃杯喝水。

example: It is a good habit to brush your teeth twice a day.
translation: 每天刷两次牙是个好习惯。

example: Eating vegetables is good for your health.
translation: 吃蔬菜对你的健康有益。

example: My grandma cooks healthy meals for us.
translation: 我奶奶为我们做健康的饭菜。

meaning: adj.亲切的；和蔼的；和善的；友好 的，善意的，体贴的 n.种类
example: My teacher is very kind to all the students.
translation: 我的老师对所有学生都很友好。

example: I need to look after my little brother when mom is busy.
translation: 妈妈忙的时候，我需要照顾我的小弟弟。

example: I have a good memory for numbers.
translation: 我对数字有很好的记忆力。

example: A: Thank you. B: Not at all.
translation: A: 谢谢。B: 不客气。

meaning: adj./pron.自己的，本人的；特有的 v.拥有；有；承认
example: I have my own room in the house.
translation: 我在家里有自己的房间。

example: There are plenty of books in the library.
translation: 图书馆里有很多书。

example: Eggs are a good source of protein.
translation: 鸡蛋是蛋白质的良好来源。

meaning: v.停留；待；保持 n.停留；逗留
example: I stay at home on rainy days.
translation: 下雨天我待在家里。

example: My dad grows string beans in the garden.
translation: 我爸爸在花园里种四季豆。

example: I put sugar in my coffee.
translation: 我在咖啡里放糖。

example: I wear a warm coat in winter.
translation: 冬天我穿一件暖和的外套。

meaning: n.体重；重量；分量；砝码；秤锤 ；重物；负担 v.使负担；装载过重 ；视......为重要
example: I check my weight every week.
translation: 我每周检查我的体重。

example: Whole grains are good for your health.
translation: 全谷物对你的健康有益。

example: The knight wears armour to protect himself.
translation: 骑士穿盔甲保护自己。

meaning: n.日记；日记本（工作日程）记事簿
example: I write in my diary every night.
translation: 我每天晚上写日记。

example: Math is difficult for me, but I try my best.
translation: 数学对我来说很难，但我尽力了。

meaning: n.⻛味；滋味；味道 v.给......添⻛味 ；调味
example: The ice cream has a chocolate flavour.
translation: 冰淇淋有巧克力味。

example: The gentleman holds the door open for others.
translation: 这位绅士为别人开门。

meaning: v.指导；指引；给某人领路 n.介绍 ，指南，手册；向导；导游
example: The tour guide shows us around the museum.
translation: 导游带我们参观博物馆。

meaning: adj.令人震惊的；恐怖的；极坏的
example: The movie was too horrible for me to watch.
translation: 这部电影太恐怖了，我不敢看。

meaning: n.女士；；淑女；女子；夫人；小姐
example: The lady helps the old man cross the street.
translation: 这位女士帮助老人过马路。

meaning: n.谚语；格言；警句 v.说；讲；说话 ；say的现在分词
example: There is a saying that practice makes perfect.
translation: 有句谚语说熟能生巧。

example: I like to eat strawberries in summer.
translation: 我喜欢在夏天吃草莓。

meaning: n.旅行；参观；旅游；游览；巡回活 动 v.旅行；旅游；游览；作巡回活动
example: We take a tour of the city by bus.
translation: 我们乘公交车游览城市。

meaning: modalv.（表示意愿）愿意；想；打 算想要；（will的过去式）将会，就 会
example: I would like to go to the park with you.
translation: 我想和你一起去公园。

example: I went to the zoo yesterday.
translation: 我昨天去了动物园。

example: I almost missed the bus this morning.
translation: 今天早上我差点错过公交车。

meaning: adv.到处；向各处；在附近；环绕 ；大约 prep.在......周围；环绕；围 绕
example: We walk around the park after dinner.
translation: 我们晚饭后在公园周围散步。

meaning: adj.瞎的；失明的；盲目的 v.使失明 ,缺乏眼光或判断力
example: The blind man uses a cane to walk.
translation: 盲人用拐杖走路。

example: The brave firefighter saves people from the fire.
translation: 勇敢的消防员从火中救人。

meaning: v.露营；宿营；使扎营（住宿）；搭 帐篷 n.营地；度假营；阵营；兵营
example: We camp in the forest during summer vacation.
translation: 暑假期间我们在森林里露营。

meaning: n.学院;大学;高等专科学校
example: My sister will go to college next year.
translation: 我姐姐明年将上大学。

meaning: adj.自信的；有自信心的；肯定的
example: I feel confident about passing the exam.
translation: 我对通过考试很有信心。

meaning: adj.死的；不运行的；枯萎的；去世 的；失去生命的 n.死；死人 adv.完 全地；绝对地
example: The plant is dead because it didn't get enough water.
translation: 这棵植物死了，因为它没有得到足够的水。

example: We saw a deer in the forest.
translation: 我们在森林里看到一只鹿。

meaning: v.死；死亡；中止；结束；消亡，消 失，灭亡
example: Many plants die in winter.
translation: 许多植物在冬天死亡。

meaning: pron.每样事物；每件事；一切；所 有事情（东西）；每样事情（东西）
example: Everything is ready for the party.
translation: 派对的一切都准备好了。

meaning: v.打斗；争论；打仗，打架；努力争 取，为斗争 n.战斗；搏斗；斗争；打 仗，打架，争论；比赛
example: The two boys fight over a toy.
translation: 两个男孩为了一个玩具打架。

example: My brother wants to be a footballer when he grows up.
translation: 我哥哥长大后想成为一名足球运动员。

example: We go hiking in the forest on weekends.
translation: 我们周末去森林里徒步旅行。

example: The heart pumps blood through the body.
translation: 心脏将血液泵送到全身。

meaning: phrase.别挂断电话；等一等；抓紧 不放；继续；坚持
example: Hold on, I'm coming.
translation: 等一下，我来了。

example: Hybrid rice helps to feed more people.
translation: 杂交水稻有助于养活更多的人。

meaning: n.国王，君主 vt.立为王 vi.做国王 ，统治
example: The king rules his kingdom wisely.
translation: 国王明智地统治着他的王国。

meaning: v.离开；使保留；把......留下；忘了 带，丢下；离开；遗弃 n.假期，休假
example: I leave home at 7:30 every morning.
translation: 我每天早上7:30离开家。

meaning: v.移动；搬动；（使）改变位置；搬 家 n.行动；移动
example: We move to a new house next month.
translation: 我们下个月搬到新房子。

example: Robin Hood lived in Nottingham.
translation: 罗宾汉住在诺丁汉。

example: The shy girl doesn't like to talk to strangers.
translation: 这个害羞的女孩不喜欢和陌生人说话。

example: The soldier defends his country.
translation: 士兵保卫他的国家。

example: We should help the poor and needy.
translation: 我们应该帮助穷人和有需要的人。

meaning: adj.聪明的；明智的，明晰的；充满 智慧的；英明的
example: The wise old man gives good advice.
translation: 这位聪明的老人给出好建议。

meaning: n.(复数是women）妇女，女人；成 年女子
example: The woman works as a doctor in the hospital.
translation: 这位女士在医院当医生。

meaning: n.作者；作家,记者,撰稿者,抄写员
example: My favorite writer is J.K. Rowling.
translation: 我最喜欢的作家是J.K.罗琳。

meaning: adj.年幼的；年轻的；岁数不大的
example: The young boy is very energetic.
translation: 这个小男孩非常精力充沛。

example: My friend is a bookworm who loves reading.
translation: 我的朋友是个爱读书的书虫。

example: Many movies are made in California.
translation: 许多电影在加利福尼亚拍摄。

example: We celebrate our birthday with a big party.
translation: 我们用一个大派对庆祝生日。

example: I won first place in the singing competition.
translation: 我在歌唱比赛中获得第一名。

example: Mulan is a famous Chinese heroine.
translation: 木兰是中国著名的女英雄。

example: The little girl wears a hood on her coat.
translation: 小女孩在她的外套上戴了一个兜帽。

meaning: n.欢欣，乐趣；愉快，喜悦；高兴 ，愉快；令人高兴的人
example: The children play with joy in the park.
translation: 孩子们在公园里快乐地玩耍。

example: Don't talk nonsense, tell me the truth.
translation: 别胡说八道，告诉我真相。

meaning: v.读；读书，阅读；朗读,理解；解读 n.读物
example: I read a book every night before bed.
translation: 我每天晚上睡前读一本书。

meaning: n.放松；休息（时间）；其他；剩余 部分；其余 v.（使）倚靠；停留在 ；中止
example: We need to rest after a long day.
translation: 漫长的一天后我们需要休息。

example: Robin Hood and his men lived in Sherwood Forest.
translation: 罗宾汉和他的手下住在舍伍德森林。

meaning: n.震惊；令人震惊的事；震动；冲击 ；电击；休克；浓密的头发 v.使震惊 ；使震动 adj.浓密的
example: I was in shock when I heard the news.
translation: 听到这个消息时我很震惊。

example: Spiderman is a popular superhero.
translation: 蜘蛛侠是一个受欢迎的超级英雄。

meaning: n.把戏；引起错觉（或记忆紊乱）的 事物；技巧；戏法；诡计；恶作剧 ；诀窍 v.哄骗；欺骗；欺诈
example: The magician performs a magic trick.
translation: 魔术师表演魔术。

meaning: v.获胜；赢；获得 n.胜利；赢得
example: Our team will try to win the game.
translation: 我们队将努力赢得比赛。

meaning: adj.有危险的;不安全的；有危害的
example: It is dangerous to play near the river.
translation: 在河边玩耍很危险。

meaning: adj.足够的；充足的；充分的 adv.足 够地；充分地；相当 pron.足够；充 分 n.充足；足够 int.够了
example: I have enough money to buy the book.
translation: 我有足够的钱买这本书。

example: I visit my grandparents every now and then.
translation: 我偶尔去看望我的祖父母。

example: I am glad to see you again.
translation: 我很高兴再次见到你。

example: The ocean is blue and vast.
translation: 海洋是蓝色的，广阔的。

example: The owl hoots at night.
translation: 猫头鹰在晚上鸣叫。

example: The robot can help us with housework.
translation: 机器人可以帮助我们做家务。

meaning: n.情况；状况；形势；局面；情境
example: We need to find a solution to the situation.
translation: 我们需要找到解决这个情况的方法。

meaning: adv.当然；当然可以；确定 adj.确信 ；必定的
example: I am sure that I can pass the test.
translation: 我确信我能通过考试。

meaning: n.希望；祝福；愿望 v.祝愿；希望
example: I wish you a happy birthday.
translation: 祝你生日快乐。
